feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Oracle DataWarehouse between S/4HANA and SAC Planning
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am reaching out to you concerning the following. My client embarked the SAP roadmap by buying S/4HANA FIN core, Ariba, & Fieldglass and SAC (planning) without the Datawarehouse functionality within de SAP-Stack and would like to stick to there Oracle DWH. 

I have no experience with this scenario and I am concerned concerning the following.

S/4HANA > Oracle DWH: Are we still able to use the standard business content extractors with the same functionality as if we are using DWH on HANA technologie.

Oracle DWH > SAC planning: Writeback functionality is it possible and if yes what is exactly required and  are we loosing any functionality

Oracle DWH > SAC: Hiërarchie functionality is there a delta between live & extract and is there a delta between HANA & Oracle

Oracle DWH > SAC: date notation same question as above

Oracle DWH > SAC: Attribuut time dependent, navigational same question as above

Let me know you thoughts or guide me to the right resources. Any light on this issue is welcome.

Your prompt reply is valued & much appreciated.

Regards,

nalmai

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Automated test case could not be created. Destination: 'XXX' 404 Not found
entry.content:
When trying to create a new automation test case received an error message. 

"Automated test case could not be created.

Destination: '<Automation Provider>' 404 Not found.

HTTP Status 404 - Not found."

#SAPCloudALM #API #TestAutomation #Tricentis

entry.title: Popup: Couldn't subscribe to SAP BTP. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question.
entry.content: There is a popup generated when I try to subscribe SAP BTP. Popup: Couldn't subscribe to SAP BTP. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question.

entry.title: How to access HTML5 Application in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry from mobile device
entry.content:
I create app in BAS and deploy to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.

I would like to access this app from mobile device.

Is it possible to access like via app url or something?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Updating the schema of CAPM without losing the data.
entry.content: I want to add one more column 'status' to the Books table. I'm doing this by changing the code  like, adding status below the attachments and using the command 'cds deploy' this to the sqlite db. It is working fine but the issue is that the entire data in the db is wiped. I want to keep the data in the db only but need to update the schema of the Books table. How to do that?

entry.title: How to map Groups from Okta to NEO Subaccount's Roles?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using a corporate IDP on IAS.

We want the groups to flow from OKTA to the Neo SUbaccounts however there is no section to maintain the mapping against the Role collections.

Need help to understand how this can be achieved


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Career Guide
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is Goku, and I am a Supply Chain and Operations management student. I have over year of internship experience working as Production Coordinator in a Aerospace Industry. I have learning Business process and little bit of end user experience in SAP Production Planning. Currently I am 3rd year of my college and I am learing advanced business process in SAP. As of now, I found out that I am interested in SAP and consulting sounds interesting to me what I have researched so far. I need help with finding good course or how can I start my career in SAP functional consulting? Please if you have any hints or guidance would be helpful. I googled how to become a SAP Functional consutant, and most the finding I got was need degree in IT and related field. 

It would be helpful if someone provide with certification information or how to become a SAP consultant? 

I found the course below in SAP certification website but I am not sure if it will be useful or not? Please guide! 

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-business-process-integration-with-sap-s-4hana

entry.title: Career Guidance!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is Goku, and I am a Supply Chain and Operations management student. I have over year of internship experience working as Production Coordinator in a Aerospace Industry. I have learning Business process and little bit of end user experience in SAP Production Planning. Currently I am 3rd year of my college and I am learing advanced business process in SAP. As of now, I found out that I am interested in SAP and consulting sounds interesting to me what I have researched so far. I need help with finding good course or how can I start my career in SAP functional consulting? Please if you have any hints or guidance would be helpful. I googled how to become a SAP Functional consutant, and most the finding I got was need degree in IT and related field. 

It would be helpful if someone provide with certification information or how to become a SAP consultant? 

I found the course below in SAP certification website but I am not sure if it will be useful or not? Please guide! 

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-business-process-integration-with-sap-s-4hana

entry.title: C4C fill table in fuction
entry.content: I have a function and I want to fill the returns from this function into a table within the same function. How can I do this? It's an emergency, can you help me?

entry.title: OOPS! we faced an issue processing your request in DMS while onboarding a repository
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

Installed Document Management Service-Integration Option free tier in SAP BTP subaccount and created a service key.


SAP Business Technology Platform , SAP Document Management service 

Via postman, configuring the Auth2.0 with the service key created, need to create a repository. URL path, Body data in below screenshot.

Getting an error – 500 internal server error like in the below screenshot

Kindly guide me through if I'm missing something.
Thanks in advance.
Best Regards,
Boopalan M

entry.title: ClientCredentials grant flow with one XSUAA and multiple apps inlcuding scopes
entry.content:
I would like to do server-to-server communication on the BTP (CF) using the ClientCredentials grant flow with custom scopes. For example, consider a client app and a server app that are bound to the same XSUAA and destination service instance as they are deployed in a single manifest.yaml. During deployment, a destination is created for the server API with the ClientCredentials grant flow as authentication.

The error occurs when the destination is fetched from the Destination Service. Then, the ClientCredentails grant flow is executed by the Destination Service and fails as the scope "Test.Admin" is invalid. Omitting the scope lets the flow complete, but the access token does not include the scope and thus endpoints of the server app which require the "Admin" role can not be called.

The destination looks like this:

 

tokenServiceURLType=Dedicated
clientId=exampleClientId
clientSecret=exampleClientSecret
xsappname=exampleAppName
tokenServiceURL=https\://60ccf4actrial.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
WebIDEEnabled=true
HTML5.ForwardAuthToken=false
TokenServiceURLType=Dedicated
URL=https\://exampleURL.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com
Name=server-api
Type=HTTP
verificationkey=***
Authentication=OAuth2ClientCredentials
scope=Test.Admin
ProxyType=Internet

 

 

The xs-security.json for the single, shared XSUAA instance looks like this:

 

{
  "xsappname": "${default-xsappname}",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "scopes": [
    {
      "name": "Test.Admin"
    }
  ],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": [
    {
      "name": "Admin",
      "description": "",
      "scope-references": ["Test.Admin"],
      "attribute-references": []
    }
  ],
  "oauth2-configuration": {
    "redirect-uris": ["https://*.hana.ondemand.com/**"]
  },
  "authorities": ["$ACCEPT_GRANTED_AUTHORITIES", "Test.Admin"]
}

 

  

The issue can be manually reproduced, simulating what the Destination Service does when fetching the destination:

 

 

// Fetch token from XSUAA using ClientCredentials grant flow
GET {{tokenServiceURL}}?grant_type=client_credentials&scope=Test.Admin
Authorization: Basic exampleClientId:exampleClientSecret

 

 

Additionally, the simplified manifest.yaml looks like this:

_schema-version: "3.1"
ID: example
version: 1.0.0
description: "Example project for server-to-server communication in background jobs"
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

modules:
  - name: client
    # ....
    requires:
      - name: example-uaa
      - name: example-destination
      - name: server
    provides:
      - name: client-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}

  - name: server
    # ...
    requires:
      - name: example-uaa
      - name: example-destination
    provides:
      - name: server-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}

  # ---------------------- DESTINATIONS --------------------------
  - name: example-destination-content
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: com.sap.application.content
    build-parameters:
      no-source: true
    requires:
      - name: example-destination
        parameters:
          content-target: true
      - name: server-api
      - name: example-uaa
        parameters:
          service-key:
            name: example-uaa-key
    parameters:
      content:
        instance:
          existing_destinations_policy: update
          destinations:
            - Name: server-api
              URL: ~{server-api/srv-url}
              WebIDEEnabled: true
              Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials
              HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: false # when enabled, the ClientCredentials flow is not triggered
              TokenServiceURLType: Dedicated
              TokenServiceInstanceName: example-uaa
              TokenServiceKeyName: example-uaa-key

resources:
  - name: example-uaa
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: example-uaa
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: example
      service-keys:
        - name: example-uaa-key
  - name: example-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: example-destination
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite

Is this even possible with a single shared XSUAA instance or do I need to create one XSUAA instance for each app?

entry.title: How to switch to Global account from BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have opened a BTP trial account which was very easy. Now that I want to switch the account to Gloabl I am unable to do so getting the below error 

The Analyze Cost UI will be deprecated on 01/09/2024. Please switch to our Internal Cost Management Reports for advanced cost analysis (reports: One on global account level, and another on the subaccount level)
Request your help.

entry.title: Shared row axis in two tables in SAP Analytics Cloud table report
entry.content:
Hi all

we are having the following requirement from a customer.

we want to create a table report in SAP Analytics Cloud with shared row axis. On the left hand side we want to show the periodic amounts and on the right hand side the YTD amounts. In SAP BPC we could create this using the shared axis selection. Is there any relevant feature or workaround in SAC?

BR

entry.title: Standalone Event mesh Roadmap
entry.content:
Hello SAP /Experts,

Can you please suggest if standalone Event mesh should be used in new implementation  ,as use case is not extensive and does not require Advance event mesh solution and is not fitting in the t-shirt size of Advance event mesh scenario ,if standalone event mesh can be used in new implementation, can the monitoring capability be enhanced ?

what is SAP recommendation on usage of standalone event mesh , i am not finding any definitive information and guidance here ,please suggest.

Thanks,

Siddharth

SAP Event Mesh SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate two different SuccessFactors instances? Not in same landscape!
entry.content:
Hello Dear Members,

I would need your inputs on this question.

My customer has a requirement to integrate two different SuccessFactors landscapes, where data for one legal entity needs to be transferred from the Parent Instance to the Child Instance via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or any other possible way.

  • Is this integration technically feasible?
  • If yes, what challenges might we face during implementation?
  • If not, are there any recommended workarounds?

Additionally, can the integration include all data (e.g., employee master data, payroll-related information, organizational structure, etc.), or is it limited to transferring only a Mini Master Data (such as Employee Profile)?

Looking forward to insights from the community on best practices or possible limitations for such an integration.

Best regards,

Siva

entry.title: Can you federate content from R3 into BTP workzone?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an existing transaction in an on premise ECC system (with embeded SAP_GWFND component) that we'd want to consume from the BTP Launchpad (SAP Build Workzone, advanced edition).

Is there any way to do this?

We tried creating an app in BTP with UI technology "SAP GUI for HTML" and the transaction code, but it didn't work (just got an internal error message when tried to access the tile within the launchpad).

We also tried federating the content from ECC into BTP workzone content management (as a new content provider), but didn't work either and all the documentation we found for on-prem federation only refers to SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business Suite or SAP Enterprise Portal (nothing for ECC R3, so not sure if this is a viable option).

Any advice or suggestion would be appreciated.

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Basic Authentication not working in BAS or CICD
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the following tutorial with the Trial BTP Account:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/set-up-cicd.html

It asks in here to create credentials for Cloud Foundry. However, on the trial account, the credentials I use to log into BTP account do not work even with BAS, from where I have published the app being used in here. The credentials do not work on using them in Continuous Integration and Delivery either, as expected.

 

On BAS, I am only able to log into Cloud Foundry using SSO Temporary Authentication Code, but from the given authentication options, I am not sure how to log into CF. 

Could someone please help?

Thanks

entry.title: Digital Signature Implementation
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having a scenario where we need to implement Digital Signature Where when user clicks on authenticate or Sign the the user BTP Credentials should be validated . Is there any standard approach for this or documentation. can you please help.

The current product involves Fiori applications built on BTP ABAP using BTP RAP SERVICES.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager 2410 - Branded prebuilt Client
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently working for a customer on implementing the SAP Service & Asset manager 2410 application. As part of that, we are aiming to generate the SAP Service & asset manager client with pre-built database to overcome the initial download time(sync time). can you please let me know if it is possible to generate the SSAM client with the pre-built database (similar to SAP Work Manager Agentry pre-built client)?

Kind Regards,

entry.title: BTP: Structuring subaccounts in directories
entry.content:
Folks,

So far, we have not used directories to structure our BTP subaccounts wihtin the global account. Since subaccounts have become numerous over time, it's time to group them within meaningful subdirectories. For now, we do not plan to manage entitlements on the directory level. We want directories purely for structuring purpose.

My question is: If I create subdirectories and move subaccounts into them, does this affect the subaccount in any way? I don't want to affect a running system in terms of authorizations, entitlements and so forth.

Thanks for any hint/advice.

Regards,

Stefan
